[[ファイル:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|直孤文鏡（複製品）]] '''直弧文鏡'''（ちょっこもんきょう）とは、[[古墳時代]]に日本で製作された[[銅鏡]]（仿製鏡）である。
==概要== 日本独自の銅鏡で、[[新山古墳]]から3面の出土例があるだけの大変希少な図像の鏡<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref>。 図像は[[内行花文鏡]]を基に、四葉座型の鈕座を除いて全ての図像を直線と弧で象ったものである。鈕座の周囲に内行花文を八葉巡らせ、その外周を幾何学的文様が巡らせてある。
出土した新山古墳が[[宮内庁]]の陵墓参考地であるため、直弧文鏡は宮内庁所蔵資料である。
==出土遺跡== *[[新山古墳]] [[奈良県]][[北葛城郡]]
==参考文献== {{reflist}}
==関連項目== *[[ゲゲゲの鬼太郎]] - TVアニメ第三作目で妖怪・[[雲外鏡]]との戦いに使用された[[照魔鏡]]として登場した。 *[[内行花文鏡]]
{{デフォルトソート:ちょっこもんきょう}} [[Category:日本の歴史]] [[Category:銅鏡]]

[[ファイル:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|直孤文鏡（複製品）]] '''直弧文鏡'''（ちょっこもんきょう）とは、[[古墳時代]]に日本で製作された[[銅鏡]]（仿製鏡）である。
==概要== 日本独自の銅鏡で、[[新山古墳]]から3面の出土例があるだけの大変希少な図像の鏡<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref>。 図像は[[内行花文鏡]]を基に、四葉座型の鈕座を除いて全ての図像を直線と弧で象ったものである。鈕座の周囲に内行花文を八葉巡らせ、その外周を幾何学的文様が巡らせてある。
出土した新山古墳が[[宮内庁]]の陵墓参考地であるため、直弧文鏡は宮内庁所蔵資料である。
==出土遺跡== *[[新山古墳]] [[奈良県]][[北葛城郡]]
==参考文献== {{reflist}}
==関連項目== *[[ゲゲゲの鬼太郎]] - TVアニメ第三作目で妖怪・[[雲外鏡]]との戦いに使用された[[照魔鏡]]として登場した。 *[[東方儚月抄]] - コミック版で[[綿月依姫]]が降ろした[[石凝姥命]]の持つ[[八咫鏡]]が、[[大型内行花文鏡]]と直弧文鏡を掛け合わせたデザインとして登場した。 *[[内行花文鏡]]
{{デフォルトソート:ちょっこもんきょう}} [[Category:日本の歴史]] [[Category:銅鏡]]

[[ファイル:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|直孤文鏡（複製品）]] '''直弧文鏡'''（ちょっこもんきょう）とは、[[古墳時代]]に日本で製作された[[銅鏡]]（仿製鏡）である。
==概要== 日本独自の銅鏡で、[[新山古墳]]から3面の出土例があるだけの大変希少な図像の鏡<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref>。図像は[[内行花文鏡]]を基に、四葉座型の鈕座を除いて全ての図像を直線と弧で象ったものである。鈕座の周囲に内行花文を八葉巡らせ、その外周を幾何学的文様が巡らせてある。鏡の内約は直弧文鏡が二面と素文縁直弧文鏡が一面である。
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|素文縁直弧文鏡 宮内庁蔵（[[東京国立博物館]]展示） </gallery>
出土した新山古墳が[[宮内庁]]の陵墓参考地であるため、直弧文鏡は宮内庁所蔵資料である。
==出土遺跡== *[[新山古墳]] [[奈良県]][[北葛城郡]]
==参考文献== {{reflist}}
==関連項目== *[[ゲゲゲの鬼太郎]] - TVアニメ第三作目で妖怪・[[雲外鏡]]との戦いに使用された[[照魔鏡]]として登場した。 *[[東方儚月抄]] - コミック版で[[綿月依姫]]が降ろした[[石凝姥命]]の持つ[[八咫鏡]]が、[[大型内行花文鏡]]と直弧文鏡を掛け合わせたデザインとして登場した。 *[[内行花文鏡]]
{{デフォルトソート:ちょっこもんきょう}} [[Category:日本の歴史]] [[Category:銅鏡]]

<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|素文縁直弧文鏡 宮内庁蔵（[[東京国立博物館]]展示） </gallery>

revision.comment: Created page with "[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]]. == Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮..."
revision.text:
[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== Related Topics == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}
{{Archaeology}} [[Category:Japanese history]] [[Category:Bronze mirrors]] [[Category:Archaeological artifacts]] [[ja:直弧文鏡]]

Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== Related Topics == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}
{{Archaeology}} [[Category:last 100]][[Category:Japanese history]] [[Category:last 100]][[Category:Bronze mirrors]] [[Category:last 100]][[Category:Archaeological artifacts]] [[category:most recent 500]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:Straight Arc Mirror]][[Category:kk]] [[ja:直弧文鏡]]

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].

The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. <gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.

revision.text:
[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== Related Topics == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}
{{Archaeology}} [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:Straight Arc Mirror]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:Japanese history]]

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== Related Topics == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== Related Topics == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})

== Related Topics == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}} [[ja:直弧文鏡]]

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.

revision.text:
[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}} [[ja:直弧文鏡]]

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}} [[ja:直弧文鏡]]

revision.text:
[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}} [[ja:直弧文鏡]]

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}}
== See Also == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}} [[ja:直弧文鏡]]

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})

revision.text:
[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}})
== References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|ja|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungai-kyō|ja|雲外鏡}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|ja|八咫鏡}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large Flowered Interior Mirror|ja|大型内行花文鏡}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * {{ill|Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡}}
{{Archaeology}}
<!--Straight Arc Mirror-->
<!--Straight Arc Mirror-->
<!--Straight Arc Mirror-->

Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.

The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. [[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|12=draft}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the {{ill|Flower mirror|lt=Mirror with Flowery Interiors|ja|内行花文鏡|12=draft}}. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|ja|東京国立博物館|12=draft}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|ja|宮内庁|12=draft}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|ja|広陵町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県|12=draft}})

revision.text:
[[ファイル:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|直孤文鏡（複製品）]] '''直弧文鏡'''（ちょっこもんきょう）とは、[[古墳時代]]に[[日本列島]]で製作された[[銅鏡]]（仿製鏡）である。
== 概要 == 日本列島独自の銅鏡で、[[奈良県]][[北葛城郡]][[広陵町]]所在の[[新山古墳]]から3面の出土例があるだけの大変希少な図像の鏡<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref>。図像は[[内行花文鏡]]を基に、四葉座型の鈕座を除いて全ての図像を直線と弧で象ったものである。鈕座の周囲に内行花文を八葉巡らせ、その外周を幾何学的文様が巡らせてある。鏡の内約は直弧文鏡が二面と素文縁直弧文鏡が一面である。
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|素文縁直弧文鏡 宮内庁蔵（[[東京国立博物館]]展示） </gallery>
出土した新山古墳が[[宮内庁]]の陵墓参考地であるため、直弧文鏡は宮内庁所蔵資料である。
== 出土遺跡 == * [[新山古墳]]（[[奈良県]][[北葛城郡]]）
== 参考文献 == {{reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[ゲゲゲの鬼太郎 (テレビアニメ第3シリーズ)|ゲゲゲの鬼太郎]] - 妖怪・[[雲外鏡]]との戦いに使用された[[照魔鏡]]として登場した。 * [[東方儚月抄]] - コミック版で[[綿月依姫]]が降ろした[[石凝姥命]]の持つ[[八咫鏡]]が、[[大型内行花文鏡]]と直弧文鏡を掛け合わせたデザインとして登場した。 * [[内行花文鏡]]
{{考古学}} {{デフォルトソート:ちよつこもんきよう}} [[Category:日本の歴史]] [[Category:銅鏡]] [[Category:考古資料]]

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Kōryō, Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the [[:en:Flower mirror|Mirror with Flowery Interiors]]. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] (exhibited at the [[:en:Tokyo National Museum|Tokyo National Museum]]) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.

Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.

revision.text:
[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[:en:Bronze mirror|Bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Kōryō, Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the [[:en:Flower mirror|Mirror with Flowery Interiors]]. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] (exhibited at the [[:en:Tokyo National Museum|Tokyo National Museum]]) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} ([[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Kōryō, Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]])

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:直弧文鏡]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60997098]] Wikidata name: chokkomon-kyō [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[:en:Bronze mirror|Bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Kōryō, Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the [[:en:Flower mirror|Mirror with Flowery Interiors]]. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] (exhibited at the [[:en:Tokyo National Museum|Tokyo National Museum]]) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:直弧文鏡]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q60997098]] Wikidata name: chokkomon-kyō [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of [[:en:Bronze mirror|Bronze mirror]] (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Kōryō, Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the [[:en:Flower mirror|Mirror with Flowery Interiors]]. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] (exhibited at the [[:en:Tokyo National Museum|Tokyo National Museum]]) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.

== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} in [[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Kōryō, Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]].<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the [[:en:Flower mirror|Mirror with Flowery Interiors]]. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]] (exhibited at the [[:en:Tokyo National Museum|Tokyo National Museum]]) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the [[:en:Imperial Household Agency|Imperial Household Agency]], the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} ([[:en:Kōryō, Nara|Kōryō, Nara]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]])
== References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * [[:en:GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)]] - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai [[:en:Ungaikyō|Ungai-kyō]]. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Touhou Bougetsushou|1=Touhou Bougetsushou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q210779}} - The [[:en:Yata no Kagami|Yata no Kagami]], wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東方儚月抄|1=Touhou Bougetsushou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q210779}}, appears with a design combining the [[:en:Large flower mirror|Large Flowered Interior Mirror]] and the Chokkomon Mirror. * [[:en:Flower mirror|Flower mirror]]

[[File:直孤文鏡 CIMG0083.jpg|thumb|Replica of a Chokkomon Mirror]] '''Chokkomon Mirror''' (直弧文鏡) is a type of {{ill|Bronze mirror|en|Bronze mirror|WD=Q1041984|lt=Bronze mirror|1=Bronze mirror}} (仿製鏡) produced during the [[Kofun period]] in the [[Japanese archipelago]].
== Overview == The Chokkomon Mirror is a uniquely Japanese bronze mirror with only three known examples, all excavated from the {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} in {{ill|Kōryō, Nara|en|Kōryō, Nara|WD=Q1346830|lt=Kōryō, Nara|1=Kōryō, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}.<ref>宮内庁公式ホームページ 皇室に伝わる文化</ref> It is an extremely rare design, derived from the [[:en:Flower mirror|Mirror with Flowery Interiors]]. The design features motifs made entirely of straight lines and arcs, except for the four-petaled knob seat. Surrounding the knob seat are eight interior floral patterns, with geometric patterns encircling the perimeter. Among the mirrors from this site, two are Chokkomon Mirrors and one is a plain-bordered Chokkomon Mirror.
<gallery widths="190px" heights="190px"> File:Large domestic mirror, Kofun period, 300s-400s AD, bronze - Tokyo National Museum - Ueno Park, Tokyo, Japan - DSC09131.jpg|Plain-Bordered Chokkomon Mirror, held by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|WD=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}} (exhibited at the {{ill|Tokyo National Museum|en|Tokyo National Museum|WD=Q653433|lt=Tokyo National Museum|1=Tokyo National Museum}}) </gallery>
Because Shinyama Kofun is a reference site managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|WD=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}}, the Chokkomon Mirrors are part of its collection.
== Excavation Site == * {{ill|Shinyama Kofun|ja|新山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinyama Kofun|qq=}} ({{ill|Kōryō, Nara|en|Kōryō, Nara|WD=Q1346830|lt=Kōryō, Nara|1=Kōryō, Nara}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}})
== References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|en|GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|WD=Q85871216|lt=GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)|1=GeGeGe no Kitarō (1985 TV series)}} - Features the Chokkomon Mirror as the "Shōmakyō" (照魔鏡) used in battle against the yokai {{ill|Ungaikyō|en|Ungaikyō|WD=Q3549907|lt=Ungai-kyō|1=Ungaikyō}}. * {{ill|Touhou Bougetsushou|ja|東方儚月抄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Touhou Bougetsushou|1=Touhou Bougetsushou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q210779}} - The {{ill|Yata no Kagami|en|Yata no Kagami|WD=Q2610017|lt=Yata no Kagami|1=Yata no Kagami}}, wielded by {{ill|Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja|綿月依姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watatsuki no Yorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東方儚月抄|1=Touhou Bougetsushou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q210779}}, appears with a design combining the {{ill|Large flower mirror|en|Large flower mirror|WD=Q11433747|lt=Large Flowered Interior Mirror|1=Large flower mirror}} and the Chokkomon Mirror. * [[:en:Flower mirror|Flower mirror]]
